category_sources: source_facts.description says fabric-ai is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies the AI framework, distinguishing it from the package formula name fabric-ai.
source_facts.homepage points to the official danielmiessler/fabric repository, whose project name is Fabric.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; its README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/danielmiessler/fabric, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists fabric-ai as a command-line executable.
